title: Derrière la façade
writer: Yves Mirande, Georges Lacombe, Max Kolpé
actors: Lucien Baroux, Jules Berry, André Lefaur
plot: The owner of an apartment building is found murdered. Two rival policemen, Boucheron and Lambert, investigate the matter and get into the private lives of the tenants: an unfaithful judge, a crippled blind man and his daughter, an...
